# 2025-26 PPG Prediction and Clustering

This project uses Linear Regression and K-Means clustering to analyze 
and predict the highest PPG averages of NBA players for the 2025-26 NBA Season.
It includes data preprocessing, supervised learning (for PPG prediction), 
and unsupervised learning (for player clustering). 

## Data 
The data is from:
https://www.basketball-reference.com/leagues/NBA_2025_per_game.html

I copied and pasted it into a CSV file, this way I could use pandas CSV reading functions


### Install 
Install all dependencies with:

pip3 install pandas scikit-learn matplotlib seaborn

*** IMPORTANT ***
Make sure that you download the entire file, since the CSV file is required for the prediction
